critical_flaws: Cys328 is E. coli IscS catalytic residue, not human NFS1 regulatory cysteine — species numbering error
No documented redox-regulatory cysteine in human NFS1 beyond catalytic Cys381
strengths_retained: General concept (NFS1 redox gating) plausible with correct residue
critic_questions: Which SPECIFIC cysteine in human NFS1 is the proposed redox sensor? Provide PDB evidence.
Could the mechanism work through Cys381 directly?
Has any redox proteomics study identified oscillating cysteine oxidation on human NFS1?

critical_flaws: Cluster half-life (~2h) estimated not measured in cells
NADH feedback loop adds 3-4 untested steps
CISD2 KO aging phenotype may confound circadian measurements
strengths_retained: Triple convergence (redox, pH, Ca2+) at single protein
Unique MAM position among Fe-S proteins
critic_questions: Provide more rigorous CISD2 cluster half-life in cellulo estimate
Does forward direction (clock → CISD2 → Ca2+) stand alone without feedback?
Expected effect size of CISD2 cluster oscillation on mitochondrial Ca2+?

critical_flaws: Mitochondrial Prx3 resistant to hyperoxidation (Cox 2009 Biochem J)
Matrix H2O2 steady-state ~0.15µM, below Fe-S destruction threshold >1µM
Edgar 2012 RBC system lacks mitochondria and most Fe-S proteins
strengths_retained: Transformative impact if quantitative gap resolved
critic_questions: Address Prx3 hyperoxidation resistance directly
Evidence for transient matrix H2O2 pulses >1µM?
Would mechanism work through cytoplasmic Prx1/2 on cytoplasmic Fe-S proteins?

critical_flaws: Nadimpalli 2024 attributes rhythm to FEEDING not intrinsic clock
IRP2 oscillates 10-fold vs IRP1 predicted ~2-fold — IRP2 likely dominant
IRP1-C437S chronic iron effects confound circadian measurements
strengths_retained: Unmeasured IRP1 cluster occupancy gap REAL and literature-acknowledged
Even as minor contributor, scientifically significant
Apo/holo native gel assay cheap, fast, directly measures prediction
critic_questions: If feeding-driven, what SPECIFIC mechanism connects feeding to IRP1 cluster occupancy?
Design test separating IRP1 cluster from IRP2 transcriptional contribution
Predicted magnitude of IRP1 vs IRP2 contribution?

critical_flaws: Dependent on H1 (Cys328 mechanism) which is FATAL
No independent mechanism for NFS1 activity oscillation
strengths_retained: Chronopharmacology concept viable if NFS1 oscillation mechanism found
critic_questions: Provide independent mechanism for NFS1 activity oscillation not depending on Cys328
If NFS1 mRNA oscillates, would protein-level change suffice given long half-life?

critical_flaws: GSH/GSSG ratio shows NO significant diurnal rhythm (Pekovic-Vaughan 2014 PNAS)
Mitochondrial GSH imported independently via SLC25A39
strengths_retained: GLRX5 as central hub real and under-studied
critic_questions: Alternative mechanism for circadian GLRX5 regulation beyond GSH?
Could GLRX5 be regulated by phosphorylation or protein-protein interactions?

critical_flaws: Direction error: Lamia 2009 showed AMPK → CRY1, not BMAL1 → AMPK
Vocabulary re-description: clock → energy sensor → mitochondrial gene is known
Generator self-flagged risk
strengths_retained: NFS1 as PGC-1α target checkable in ChIP-seq databases
critic_questions: Do not regenerate — direction error and vocabulary re-description not recoverable

critical_flaws: Ferritin buffering potently dampens LIP oscillation
Mitoferrin may rate-limit independently of frataxin
FA carrier effect size may be below clinical detection
strengths_retained: FA carrier prediction testable if detectable
critic_questions: Published LIP oscillation amplitude in hepatocytes over 24h?
Does mitoferrin expression show circadian variation?
Minimum detectable effect size in FA carrier cohort?

meta_critique: 50% kill rate within healthy 30-70% range. Fatal verdicts backed by specific literature: Cys328 species error, GSH ratio no rhythm, Lamia 2009 direction error. Quality Gate predictions: H2 (CISD2) and H4 (IRP1) most likely to pass.
